channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Adjuvanted and high-dose flu vaccines show comparable effectiveness in adults
item.description: 1. Adjuvanted influenza vaccines showed no significant difference in effectiveness compared to high-dose vaccines against lab-confirmed influenza in adults.

item.title: Early signs that may indicate breast cancer
Essential vitamins and nutrients for women's health
Giuliana Rancic opens up about her career, breast cancer, and staying active
item.description: In WebMD's Real Stories Breast Cancer guide, Rancic, 51, reflects on her red carpet career, breast cancer experience, and staying active.
